task_completion.description: Determine the 'SLA_Status' for each entry using a 7-day limit.

A sheet tab named 'Ward_Summary' is visible at the bottom of the spreadsheet application.

task_completion.description: Save the updated spreadsheet to the original file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The save icon indicates no unsaved changes (e.g., no asterisk next to the filename), or a save dialog is visible confirming the file is being saved to /home/ga/Documents/chicago_311_potholes.xlsx.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical spreadsheet application to complete the task.

integrity.description: The agent used spreadsheet formulas to calculate values rather than hardcoding answers.
integrity.visual_evidence: The formula bar shows actual formulas (e.g., subtraction for dates, IF statements for SLA status, or pivot table configurations) when cells are selected, rather than plain text/numbers.

integrity.description: The agent did not use external scripts to bypass GUI interaction.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected file to be modified and saved is /home/ga/Documents/chicago_311_potholes.xlsx. The SLA threshold for determining the SLA_Status is exactly 7 days.
